title: Semos Cosmetic Addon Lib
description: This allow cosmetics addon to work on my villagers pack
body:
This pack let you use cosmetic addon packs to my villagers packs, namely [**[**<font color="#008000">**Hermitcraft Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hermitcraft-villagers), [**[**<font color="#008000">**Songs Of War Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/songs-of-war-villagers) and [**[**<font color="#008000">**Alex and Steve Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alex-and-steve-villagers)  

This pack uses some [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) exclusive features and therefore <font color="#f02222">**is not compatible with optifine!**</font>  
Keep track of what versions of my packs are compatible with wich addon version with this file: [[<font color="#daa520">with this link</font>](https://1drv.ms/x/c/5017ea34619ff0f9/EYARtfWSbd1IsoYWCn7M-CkBHKTpT6MVfBMwl93LenDkAg?e=dbVTA0)]  
This pack is meant to be used as dependancy by other packs. **Nothing will be displayed by this pack itself.**
### List of pack requiring it: 

- [**[**<font color="#008000">**Christmas Cosmetics**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/christmas-cosmetic) by [<font color="#daa520">Seb_Semos</font>](https://modrinth.com/user/SebSemos)


You can also add the cosmetics to your models by using this pack as a dependency. 
### <font color="#daa520">How to:</font> [Coming soon]

Example of villagers with Christmas Cosmetics:
![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9f4a2d9ab1ff37b2a110ec5305ba59734849c8f.png)
